MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PERSONALITY HOTELS II, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. The default and default judgment are set aside.
